chunk:
Dr. Jane Smith is a professor of Computer Science at the university. 
    She specializes in artificial intelligence and machine learning.
    Her research focuses on natural language processing and computer vision.

and computer vision.
She teaches the following courses:
    - CS101: Introduction to Programming
    - CS301: Machine Learning Fundamentals
    - CS401: Advanced AI Techniques

vanced AI Techniques
Dr. Smith has published over 50 papers in top-tier conferences and journals.
    She has received multiple grants from the National Science Foundation.
    Students praise her clear explanations and engaging teaching style.
